coverage_note: The bundled PPARG population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from PPARG nuclear receptor transcriptional control of adipogenesis, insulin sensitivity, lipid storage, inflammation, and thiazolidinedione pharmacology and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000132170: PPARG coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: PPARG findings should be read against nuclear receptor transcriptional control of adipogenesis, insulin sensitivity, lipid storage, inflammation, and thiazolidinedione pharmacology; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

rs1801282 (PPARG Pro12Ala) is curated as a PPARG marker for Adipogenesis and insulin-sensitivity biology, Type 2 diabetes and metabolic trait association research; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

PPARG dominant-negative model is curated as a PPARG marker for Adipogenesis and insulin-sensitivity biology, Type 2 diabetes and metabolic trait association research; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
